Name: Eastman Cut Off ECM 355A Speed 3800 RPM Metal Cutter Chop Saw Solid Rigid Base Aluminium Gear Housing Free Carbon Set
Description: POWERFUL 2400W MOTOR: Equipped with a high-performance 2400 Watt motor and heavy-duty armature (78mm core length), delivering a rapid 3800 RPM to effortlessly slice through iron, steel, and aluminum pipes or bars. HEAVY-DUTY BUILD: Features a Strong Aluminium Gear Housing for superior durability and heat dissipation, ensuring the tool stays cool and performs consistently under heavy industrial loads. STABLE & PRECISE CUTS: Designed with a Solid Rigid Base that prevents wobbling during operation, coupled with a high-quality 355mm (14-inch) wheel diameter for accurate, professional-grade cutting results. ERGONOMIC DESIGN: The comfortable D-Type Handle reduces user fatigue and provides a secure grip, allowing for better control and safety during high-speed cutting applications. VALUE PACKAGE: Comes ready for the long haul with a Free Carbon Set included in the box, ensuring you have the necessary spares to keep your machine running smoothly without immediate extra costs. ›
